overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character leading a saddled horse along a railway track through a rainy, forested wilderness. The character walks beside the tracks before crossing to the other side midway through the clip, with heavy rain and overcast skies creating a moody atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: railway cutting through forested hills with rocky cliff face

agents.ego_description: leading a saddled horse by the reins along a grassy embankment beside railway tracks

notable_agents.action: dark horse with saddle being led along the path, walking steadily beside the character

entered.detail: curved steel railway tracks with wooden sleepers running parallel to the path
tall moss-covered rock wall rising steeply beside the railway
dense deciduous trees with green foliage beyond the railway tracks
wet grass and mud path where the character is walking

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a grassy embankment beside railway tracks, leading a saddled horse through heavy rain. A rocky cliff face rises on the right while dense forest extends beyond the tracks on the left, creating a narrow corridor through the wilderness.

events.description: character turns left and begins crossing the railway tracks to the other side

agents.ego_description: guiding the horse across the railway tracks, stepping over the rails and sleepers

notable_agents.action: horse following closely behind the character, stepping carefully over the tracks

segments.scene_description: The character turns left to cross the railway tracks, moving from the grassy embankment onto the gravel rails. The rocky cliff falls behind as the character and horse traverse the tracks, transitioning to the opposite side of the railway line.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the grassy verge on the opposite side of the tracks, heading toward open hills

notable_agents.action: horse walking calmly on the left side of the character, reins held taut

entered.detail: gently sloping hill covered with scattered trees and tall grass

segments.scene_description: Now on the opposite side of the tracks, the character continues walking through the rain with the railway now on the right. The landscape opens into a wooded hillside with scattered trees and rolling green hills visible in the distance, replacing the rocky cliff from the first segment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy wilderness as the perspective shifts from a narrow cliffside corridor to an open wooded hillside. It begins with the character leading a saddled horse along a grassy embankment beside railway tracks, flanked by a towering rocky cliff on the right and dense forest on the left. As the character turns left to cross the gravel rails, the rocky cliff face recedes and falls behind them. The scene then opens up on the opposite side of the tracks, where the railway now sits to the right. Finally, the landscape expands into a vista of scattered trees and rolling green hills in the distance, replacing the enclosed cliffside with a broader, rain-swept horizon.
